page: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC processor with 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs, operating at a base speed of 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features a dedicated CPU allocation with no hyperthreading, providing exactly 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB. Local storage is provided by a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The server runs on a KVM hypervisor and includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores all ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth for cached small blocks is also in the top tier, while uncached large-block reads and writes fall into the top 25%. Single-core performance is strong, though single-threaded compression tasks like gzip and bzip3 decompression perform at average levels. The system excels in multi-threaded decompression, ray tracing, and software compilation, where it achieves top-tier results.

This hardware profile is highly suited for compute-intensive workloads such as multi-threaded software compilation, image processing, ray tracing, and Redis database operations, where it achieves top-tier transaction throughput. While the 2.0 GB of RAM per core represents a lower memory-to-CPU ratio typical of compute-optimized classes, the dedicated physical cores offer high resource density and predictable performance. The server is less suited for memory-bound applications or large-scale LLM text generation, which exhibit average performance in testing.
description: The OVHcloud c3-128 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.3 GHz with no hyperthreading. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and an 8 Gbps baseline network interface. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and Redis transaction throughput. While single-core tasks and single-threaded compression perform at average levels, its multi-threaded capabilities, ray tracing, and image processing benchmarks rank in the top 10%. The low memory-to-CPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core makes it highly resource-dense and cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads rather than memory-intensive databases. It is best suited for parallel processing, CI/CD pipelines, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallel processing and compilation workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for high-compute workloads.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized server featuring sixty-four dedicated physical cores and local NVMe storage for demanding parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with no hyperthreading
128.0 GB RAM and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and software compilation performance
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Optimized for parallel processing, ray tracing, and Redis operations
